instruction: Classify the support ticket into a priority/type bucket.
baseline_prompt: You are a support-priority classifier. Classify the support ticket into a priority/type bucket. Classify into one of these categories: outage_critical, data_loss, billing, feature_request, how_to, integration.
source: Authored for TEI-Bench (Sonnet-generated, Sonnet-validated; kept only label-agreed examples).

train.query: Your cloud infrastructure appears to be down in the US-East region. All our production workloads hosted there are inaccessible and our 24/7 service is completely offline affecting thousands of active users.
After syncing this morning, we discovered that all meeting notes from Q4 have been replaced with empty documents. The titles are there but the content inside each file is completely blank.
Is it possible to get a pro-rated refund for the remaining two months of our annual plan since we're shutting down our project?

It would be incredibly helpful if we could set custom notification schedules instead of just the preset options. Our team works across different time zones and the current settings don't align well with our workflow.
Is there documentation on bulk uploading users via spreadsheet? We're onboarding 50 new employees and want to avoid adding them one by one.
We need help troubleshooting our Google Calendar sync. Events created in your platform aren't appearing in our users' calendars, but we can see successful 200 responses in the API logs.
Total platform failure - every module shows error messages and no functionality is available. Our entire workforce of 1,500 people cannot perform any work tasks. This started at 11:00 AM.
We accidentally deleted an important folder and the undelete function isn't working. Is there any way to restore the 120 files that were in there from a previous backup?
Can you provide a detailed breakdown of all the charges on our latest statement? Some line items are unclear to our accounting department.

We'd really appreciate the ability to customize the email templates that get sent to our customers. The current generic format doesn't match our brand voice and we've had clients confused by the messaging.
Looking for guidance on setting up two-factor authentication for our team accounts. Is there a step-by-step guide available?
We use Zapier to push leads from your platform into HubSpot. Since this morning, every zap is failing with a 'malformed request body' error. Nothing has changed in our zap configuration.
Complete network outage on your end - we cannot reach any of your services from any of our locations. Thousands of concurrent users are being denied access and our operations are paralyzed.
Help! Our entire project folder with all design files and documentation has been wiped out. When I logged in this morning, the directory was empty even though it had 50+ files yesterday.
We need to switch from monthly to annual billing to take advantage of the discount mentioned on your pricing page.

test.query: Would it be possible to add a dark mode option to the dashboard? Many of our team members work late hours and the current bright interface causes eye strain during evening sessions.
Could you walk me through the process of customizing the dashboard widgets? I'd like to rearrange them and maybe hide some that we don't use.

I'm trying to connect our Slack workspace to your service but keep getting 'invalid scope' errors during the OAuth flow. We need read and write permissions but the authorization screen only shows read access.
The main application server cluster is unresponsive. All customer-facing services are down and we're experiencing 100% failure rate on all requests. Zero users can access the system right now.
After the system update yesterday, approximately 2,000 transaction entries are no longer visible in our dashboard. The files seem to have vanished and we can't find them anywhere in the system.
The invoice we received shows incorrect pricing compared to what was quoted during our sales call last week. Please review and send a corrected version.
Any chance of adding a mobile app? Our field technicians need to access the system while on-site and the mobile web version is difficult to navigate on smaller screens.
I'm trying to set up email notifications for new orders but can't find where to configure the SMTP settings. Could you point me to the right section in the admin panel?
Can someone help us understand why the Microsoft Teams bot we built using your SDK isn't receiving message events? The bot appears online but doesn't respond to any commands we send it.
Website is completely unreachable - returning timeout errors for everyone. We've tested from multiple locations and networks. All traffic is dead and our business is at a halt.
The export we ran last week appears to have corrupted all our inventory records. When we try to open them, we get error messages and the numbers don't match our backup counts.
We're being charged for 50 user seats but we only have 35 active users on our account. Can someone explain this discrepancy?
Is there any way you could implement two-factor authentication for admin accounts? Our security team is requiring this for all our SaaS tools and we'd hate to have to switch platforms.
How do I create automated workflows that trigger when a form submission comes in? I want to automatically assign tasks to specific team members based on the submission type.
Our data warehouse ETL job that pulls from your GraphQL API started failing this morning with 'rate limit exceeded' errors, even though we're only making 50 requests per minute and the limit is 100.
Database connection failures across all our services starting 20 minutes ago. Nothing is working - no queries are going through and all application functionality is frozen for every user.
Critical issue: product images for about 300 items in our catalog have disappeared overnight. The database shows the entries but the actual image files are nowhere to be found.
I was charged twice this month for my subscription and need a refund for the duplicate transaction that appeared on my credit card statement.
Could the search functionality be enhanced to include filtering by multiple tags simultaneously? Right now we can only filter by one tag at a time which makes finding specific items tedious.
What's the correct procedure for transferring ownership of a project to another user? I'm leaving the team and need to hand off my projects.

Our Salesforce connector stopped syncing customer data yesterday afternoon. We're getting a 401 authentication error when trying to establish the connection, even though our API credentials haven't changed.
URGENT: All API endpoints are returning 503 errors since 3:15 AM EST. Our mobile app is completely non-functional and millions of users cannot log in or access any services whatsoever.
The spreadsheet with all our vendor contracts has become unreadable. Every time we try to access it, we see garbled characters instead of the actual data we entered.
The automatic renewal charged us for the premium tier, but we wanted to downgrade to basic before the renewal date. Can this be adjusted?
